case_title: THU NGA THI VO VS. JIAN HUI HUANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VO, THU NGA THI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUANG, JIAN HUI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL ; FORM SC-150 USED (RESET) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VO, THU NGA THI AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, JIAN HUI
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY VO, THU NGA THI HUANG, JIAN HUI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2018 BY PRO TEM MARC SEIDENFELD. PLAINTIFF THU NGA THI VO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER KUY DAO #300130. DEFENDANT JIAN HUI HUANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY HIS OWN INTERPRETER GEORGE TIN. CLERK GARY FELICIANO ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH TO GEORGE TIN DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506
